ItacWorkItem.Notes: Engraving showing the south facade of the building where the Academy was based. Attributed to Giulio Bonasone, see Giulio Bonasone, Catalogue, ed. Stefania Massari (Rome, 1983), vol. I, pp. 52-3; see also Palazzo Bocchi, ed. Michele Danieli and Davide Ravaioli (Bologna, 2006).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
